judgment.summary: Rapidly growing, highly profitable company with strong cash flow, though trading at a premium valuation and with elevated leverage.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 18.1%; next earnings date is 2026-08-03.
positives: Revenue growth 84.7% YoY and earnings growth 325.0% YoY indicate exceptional expansion.
Operating margin 46.2% and profit margin 43.7% demonstrate superior profitability.
Return on equity 32.6% and return on assets 14.7% show effective use of capital.
Free cash flow $1.75B and a robust current ratio of 6.91 suggest strong financial health.
Analyst consensus is 'buy' with a mean target of $183.73, indicating upside potential.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 150.71 and Forward P/E of 66.12 indicate a high valuation.
PEG ratio of 1.95 suggests growth may not fully justify the current P/E.
Debt/Equity ratio of 2.48 is relatively high, indicating significant leverage.
Price/Sales (TTM) of 62.94 is very high, reflecting aggressive market expectations.

news.paragraph: Palantir Technologies recently reported a record quarter, exceeding earnings estimates and showing strong revenue growth. Despite this positive operational performance, commentary from Jim Cramer suggests the stock price may have outpaced its fundamental value, while analysts maintain a 'hold' rating. Traders should consider the divergence between strong earnings and a potentially stretched valuation, with the next earnings date approaching on August 3rd.

headlines.title: Jim Cramer on Palantir: “Incredibly Good Company Whose Stock Got Ahead”
